ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fund_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fund manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the fund manager */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the fund manager */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the fund manager */,
  "educational_background" TEXT /* Educational background of the fund manager */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications of the fund manager */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the fund manager (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_schemes" (
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund scheme */,
  "scheme_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund scheme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fund scheme */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fund scheme */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fund scheme (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the fund scheme (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "minimum_investment" REAL /* Minimum investment required for the scheme */,
  "maximum_investment" REAL /* Maximum investment allowed for the scheme */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fund type */,
  "minimum_investment" REAL /* Minimum investment required for the fund type */,
  "maximum_investment" REAL /* Maximum investment allowed for the fund type */,
  "investment_horizon" TEXT /* Typical investment horizon for the fund type (e.g., short-term, long-term) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scheme the fund belongs to */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the type of fund */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the fund */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fund */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the fund */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the fund (if applicable) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the fund (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets under management */,
  "investment_horizon" TEXT /* Typical investment horizon for the fund (e.g., short-term, long-term) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funds_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES fund_managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funds_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES fund_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funds_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES fund_schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund the performance data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance data */,
  "returns" REAL /* Returns of the fund on the given date */,
  "yields" REAL /* Yields of the fund on the given date */,
  "benchmark" TEXT /* Benchmark used for performance comparison */,
  "performance_fee" REAL /* Performance-based fee */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha value, which measures the fund's performance relative to a benchmark */,
  "sharpe_ratio" REAL /* Sharpe ratio, which measures the risk-adjusted return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_performance_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset record */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund the asset belongs to */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., stocks, bonds) */,
  "allocation" REAL /* Allocation of the asset in the fund */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Market value of the asset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the asset allocation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_assets_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_risks" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk record */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund the risk belongs to */,
  "risk_type" TEXT /* Type of risk (e.g., market risk, credit risk) */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of risk (e.g., high, low) */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of the risk occurring */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Potential impact if the risk materializes */,
  "mitigation_plan" TEXT /* Mitigation plan for the risk */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_risks_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund the compliance data belongs to */,
  "regulation" TEXT /* Regulation the fund is subject to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of compliance (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance was last reviewed */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Date for the next compliance review */,
  "compliance_officer" TEXT /* Compliance officer responsible for the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund the report belongs to */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path of the report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fund manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the fund */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of access (e.g., temporary, permanent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_manager_funds" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund manager */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager started managing the fund */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the manager stopped managing the fund (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id", "fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_scheme_types" (
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund scheme */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund type */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the scheme type relationship was established */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the scheme type relationship ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scheme_id", "type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return record */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund the return belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "return" REAL /* Return value */,
  "benchmark_return" REAL /* Benchmark return for comparison */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha value, which measures the fund's performance relative to a benchmark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_returns_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_yields" (
  "yield_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each yield record */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund the yield belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the yield */,
  "yield" REAL /* Yield value */,
  "benchmark_yield" REAL /* Benchmark yield for comparison */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha value, which measures the fund's performance relative to a benchmark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("yield_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_yields_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)
